ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "price" REAL /* Market price */,
  "high_yield" REAL /* High-yield bond index */,
  "dollar_index" REAL /* US Dollar Index */,
  "krw" REAL /* Korean Won (KRW) exchange rate */,
  "tnx" REAL /* 10-year Treasury Note (TNX) yield */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Organization ID (e.g., government, institution) */,
  "foreigner" REAL /* Foreign investment flows */,
  "china" REAL /* China market performance */,
  "america" REAL /* US market performance */,
  "wti" REAL /* West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude oil price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., government, institution) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry/sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., market analysis, economic indicators) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor) */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Organization ID associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, manual upload) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_sources" (
  "market_data_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_date", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_index_values" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market index value */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "index_id")
)
column_names: West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude oil price
